title: Humanize proposal scope and coverage truth in native inspectors
summary: Replace remaining raw proposal scope and coverage metadata in native review inspectors with typed StudioStrings formatting so proposal read-back surfaces stay localized and truthful instead of exposing internal identifiers.
acceptance_criteria: Proposal artifact surfaces in the native review workspace no longer show raw scope kind or coverage tokens when a localized truthful label is available.
Any new proposal scope, target, or coverage formatting is exposed through typed StudioStrings backed by Localizable.xcstrings.
The slice keeps proposal filtering and matching behavior unchanged while improving read-back clarity.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: HS-0016 ticket schema validated after humanizing proposal scope and coverage labels in the native review workspace.
Patch hygiene passed after replacing raw proposal scope and coverage values with typed localized display labels.
Repo contract validation passed after extending the shared StudioStrings and xcstrings proposal scope formatting.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Native macOS build succeeded after rewiring review proposal inspector surfaces to use humanized scope and coverage labels.

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 item 1 was re-ranked after HS-0014 and the remaining high-leverage native localization debt is proposal/read-back truth leaking raw scope and coverage metadata.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Keep proposal artifact matching, filtering, and repo read-back behavior unchanged.
Favor localized product-truth labels over raw internal tokens in inspector UI.
